goal: Fix remaining visible or state-relevant encoding/mojibake issues in App.tsx and SettingsModal.tsx that affect settings tabs and user-facing settings text, while keeping the change tightly scoped.
constraints: Fix only clearly malformed tab identifiers, user-facing strings, and directly related text literals.
Do not refactor unrelated logic or alter settings behavior beyond what is needed to normalize the affected strings.
Preserve tab identity consistency between App.tsx and SettingsModal.tsx.
Prefer ASCII-safe replacements like ae/oe/ue if there is any encoding risk.
Run a relevant local check if practical.
success_criteria: Malformed settings tab identifiers and visible settings text in the two target files are corrected.
App.tsx and SettingsModal.tsx use consistent values for affected tab names.
A relevant local check is reported.
